_publications._publicationTitle: NF106: A Neurofibromatosis Clinical Trials Consortium Phase II Trial of the MEK Inhibitor Mirdametinib (PD-0325901) in Adolescents and Adults With NF1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Mean total Brief Pain Inventory Pain Interference subscale scores were not significantly different from baseline to course 12 at any time point for the total sample.
